title: Hotel Concierge Recommendation
text:
## Hotel Concierge Recommendation

Welcome to our {adjective} hotel in {place}.

For dinner, I recommend the bistro that serves {food} beside a {color} fountain.

If you feel {emotion}, take the {vehicle} tour led by {person}, our local {job}.

Avoid the alley with {number} {plural noun}; they tend to {verb} after sunset.

For souvenirs, buy a {object} and never mention the {animal} that is always {verb ending in -ing} in room 4 with its {body part}, wearing a {clothing item}, and guarding {number} {plural noun}.
